info.title: HR-SolX Mobile API
info.description: Comprehensive API documentation for HR-SolX mobile application including authentication, user management, candidate registration, and master data endpoints.

get.description: Simple ping endpoint to verify API is running
Detailed health check including database, cache, storage, queue, and Redis status
Get database table counts and statistics
Get system configuration and environment information

post.description: Generate and send 6-digit OTP to the provided mobile number for authentication
Verify the OTP and return authentication token for API access
Check if a user exists by user ID and return their data

get.description: Retrieve a specific user by ID

post.description: Update user information using mobile number as identifier
Store or update complex user data as JSON with image uploads
Complete candidate registration with profile, skills, experience, and preferences

get.description: Get paginated list of candidate profiles
Retrieve child skills for a parent skill
Retrieve list of all working statuses
Get paginated list of partner profiles with search and filter options
